purpose: Renders the group-invite contact picker modal as a row-based, avatar+name list (replacing the native <select>/<option> picker), preserving the existing selection/submit/loading/error/success state model exactly.

public_api.name: InviteMemberModal
public_api.signature: export default function InviteMemberModal({ isOpen, onClose, groupId }: InviteMemberModalProps): JSX.Element
public_api.description: Unchanged public component contract (isOpen/onClose/groupId props). Internal markup for the contact picker changes from Select/option to a scrollable list of clickable rows; all other behavior (submit/loading/error/success/guidance) is unchanged.

public_api.name: resolveInviteTarget
public_api.description: Unchanged. Not touched by this story.

public_api.name: submitInvite
public_api.signature: export async function submitInvite(pubkeyHex: string, groupId: string, inviteByNpub: (groupId: string, npub: string) => Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string }>): Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string }>
public_api.description: Unchanged. Not touched by this story.

owned_data: isLoading, error, success (component-local React state, unchanged)
dependencies_allowed: app/src/components/ProfileSummary.tsx (existing export, consumed as before, size="sm")
app/src/lib/contacts.ts (listContacts, selectableContactsForGroup — existing exports, unchanged consumption)
app/src/lib/nostrKeys.ts (pubkeyToNpub, truncateNpub — existing exports, unchanged consumption)
@chakra-ui/react (Box, Flex — newly imported for row shell; Select/FormControl/FormLabel/option removed)
dependencies_forbidden: No new coupling into app/src/lib/contacts.ts or app/src/components/ProfileSummary.tsx internals beyond their existing exported surface
No LinkBox/LinkOverlay/NextLink on picker rows (AC-UX-7 — rows must never navigate)
